differential_diagnoses: Anemia of chronic disease or occult gastrointestinal blood loss
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction
Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease or interstitial lung disease flare
next_steps: Complete blood count with differential and peripheral smear
Repeat transthoracic echocardiography to assess current hemodynamic severity of AS
Fecal immunochemical test (FIT) or referral for colonoscopy
Referral for cardiology consultation for TAVR evaluation
Avoid empiric diuretic therapy until objective evidence of volume overload is confirmed
